cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/payments/__init__.py b/payments/__init__.py
index ae92303..4bf853f 100644
--- a/payments/__init__.py
+++ b/payments/__init__.py
@@ -8,3 +8,10 @@ class PaymentProcessor:
 
     def _charge(self, order):
         return self._gateway.charge(order["amount"])
+
+    def process(self, order, idempotency_key):
+        if idempotency_key in self._results:
+            return self._results[idempotency_key]
+        result = self._charge(order)
+        self._results[idempotency_key] = result
+        return result

cases.name: always_charges
cases.diff:
diff --git a/payments/__init__.py b/payments/__init__.py
index ae92303..7c6e393 100644
--- a/payments/__init__.py
+++ b/payments/__init__.py
@@ -8,3 +8,8 @@ class PaymentProcessor:
 
     def _charge(self, order):
         return self._gateway.charge(order["amount"])
+
+    def process(self, order, idempotency_key):
+        result = self._charge(order)
+        self._results[idempotency_key] = result
+        return result

cases.name: ignores_key
cases.diff:
diff --git a/payments/__init__.py b/payments/__init__.py
index ae92303..b24854b 100644
--- a/payments/__init__.py
+++ b/payments/__init__.py
@@ -8,3 +8,6 @@ class PaymentProcessor:
 
     def _charge(self, order):
         return self._gateway.charge(order["amount"])
+
+    def process(self, order, idempotency_key):
+        return self._charge(order)
